title: Constitutional Rescue
desc: Guess the constitutional terms before the time runs out and save the character!
failed: You failed to save the character!

Easy.hint: The supreme legislative body of India
The system of courts that interprets and applies the law
A draft of a proposed law

Medium.hint: A minor change or addition designed to improve a text, piece of legislation, etc.
A law promulgated by the President of India
The official power to make legal decisions and judgments
A charge of misconduct made against the holder of a public office

Hard.hint: The action of discontinuing a session of a parliament or other legislative assembly without dissolving it
A judicial writ issued as a command to an inferior court or ordering a person to perform a public or statutory duty
A writ or order by which a higher court reviews a decision of a lower court
The minimum number of members of an assembly or society that must be present at any of its meetings to make the proceedings of that meeting valid
The federal principle or system of government
